title: GROCERY DELIVERY - 211info
text: STORE TO DOOR GROCERY DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides low-cost, volunteer-based shopping and delivery of groceries, prescriptions, and household supplies on a weekly basis. Clients are matched with a volunteer order taker who will call each week to take their order. Seniors enrolled in Oregon Project Independence (OPI) may qualify for a reduced fees. 7730 SW 31st Avenue Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Age 65 and older and adults with disabilities who are homebound or unable to shop for themselves Hours: Order taking: Monday-Tuesday 9am-3pm Shopping/Delivery: Wednesday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (503) 200-3333 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 200-3333 Annabelle Domenighini [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: Delivery fee of 10% of total grocery bill (prescriptions and household supplies not included). SNAP/EBT may be used to pay for the groceries. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County east to 172nd Avenue and parts of Washington County. Zip codes 97005, 97006, 97007, 97008, 97201, 97202, 97203, 97206, 97210, 97211, 97213, 97214, 97215, 97216, 97217, 97218, 97219, 97220, 97223, 97225, 97227, 97230, 97232, 97233, 97236, 97239, and 97266 TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the upper floor of the SW corner of the Meals On Wheels People building in Multnomah Village. Parking is in the rear of the building. Services: Errand Running/Shopping Assistance Grocery Ordering/Delivery If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STORE TO DOOR
